details.test: Task 1: Add two cheapest 2018 Volvo FH brake pads under $120 to cart
Task 2: Add three distinct brake pad products via filtered category listing
Task 3: Search, add two units, and reach checkout review
Task 4: Save third in-stock Bosch product in $40–$100 range to wishlist
Task 5: Compare two products and add the one with longer warranty to cart
Task 6: Add six units of cheapest free-shipping product to cart (tire flow adapted)
Task 7: Add two matching-brand products in price ranges via category flow
Task 8: VIN lookup component group flow and add product to cart
Task 9: Quick-order three part numbers, adjust cart, apply TRUCK10
